dashboard.label: DefenseClaw Gateway Health
dashboard.description: Operational health for the DefenseClaw gateway: circuit breaker state, verdict rates, sink failures, guardrail latency, and schema violations. Mirrors the Grafana overview health-at-a-glance and SLO panels.

search.query: `defenseclaw_circuit_breaker_events` | search action="circuit_breaker.*" | stats latest(circuit_state) as circuit_state latest(circuit_state_num) as circuit_state_num by component | stats max(circuit_state_num) as worst_state | eval state_label=case(worst_state=0, "closed", worst_state=1, "half-open", worst_state=2, "open", 1=1, "unknown")
`defenseclaw_gateway_verdicts_base` | stats count as verdict_count | eval verdicts_per_min=round(verdict_count/5, 2) | table verdicts_per_min
`defenseclaw_gateway_blocks` | stats count as block_count | eval blocks_per_min=round(block_count/5, 2) | table blocks_per_min
`defenseclaw_sink_failures` | stats count as fail_count | eval failures_per_min=round(fail_count/5, 2) | table failures_per_min
`defenseclaw_schema_violation_events` | stats count as violation_count | eval violations_per_min=round(violation_count/5, 2) | table violations_per_min

`defenseclaw_circuit_breaker_events` | search action="circuit_breaker.*" | timechart span=5m max(circuit_state_num) as circuit_state_num | eval circuit_state=case(circuit_state_num=0, "closed", circuit_state_num=1, "half-open", circuit_state_num=2, "open", 1=1, "unknown")
`defenseclaw_gateway_verdicts_base` | timechart span=5m count by verdict_action limit=5 useother=f

panel.title: Guardrail latency percentiles (p50 / p95 / p99) over time

search.query: `defenseclaw_guardrail_latency_events` | timechart span=5m p50(duration_ms) as p50_ms p95(duration_ms) as p95_ms p99(duration_ms) as p99_ms
`defenseclaw_sink_failures` | timechart span=5m count by component limit=5 useother=f
`defenseclaw_circuit_breaker_events` | search action="circuit_breaker.*" | table timestamp component circuit_state action severity details | sort - timestamp | head 25
`defenseclaw_sink_failures` | table timestamp component action severity error_code details run_id session_id | sort - timestamp | head 25
